attributes.description: Pod monitoring with memory decomposition, OOM risk thresholds, container restart trends, and network I/O.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS phase_latest = MAX(CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.pod.name
| EVAL phase_val = CASE(@timestamp == phase_latest, k8s.pod.phase, NULL)
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MV_FIRST(VALUES(k8s.cluster.name)),
    cpu_usage        = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws        = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    phase_num        = MAX(phase_val),
    restarts         = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.node.name    = MV_FIRST(VALUES(k8s.node.name)),
    mem_limit        = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(
      mem_limit IS NOT NULL AND mem_limit > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(memory_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(mem_limit), 4),
      NULL)
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase, cpu_usage, memory_ws, mem_limit_util, restarts, k8s.node.name
| SORT cpu_usage DESC NULLS LAST, k8s.pod.name ASC
| LIMIT 100

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS phase_latest = MAX(CASE(k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.pod.name
| EVAL phase_val = CASE(@timestamp == phase_latest, k8s.pod.phase, NULL)
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MV_FIRST(VALUES(k8s.cluster.name)),
    cpu_usage        = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws        = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    phase_num        = MAX(phase_val),
    restarts         = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    k8s.node.name    = MV_FIRST(VALUES(k8s.node.name)),
    mem_limit        = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name
| EVAL
    phase = CASE(
      phase_num == 1, "Pending",
      phase_num == 2, "Running",
      phase_num == 3, "Succeeded",
      phase_num == 4, "Failed",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(
      mem_limit IS NOT NULL AND mem_limit > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(memory_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(mem_limit), 4),
      NULL)
| KEEP k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.name, phase, cpu_usage, memory_ws, mem_limit_util, restarts, k8s.node.name
| SORT cpu_usage DESC NULLS LAST, k8s.pod.name ASC
| LIMIT 100

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    working_set = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    rss = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    working_set = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, rss, working_set, available

embeddableConfig.description: Memory composition over time. RSS, working set, and available memory as separate series. SUM per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory composition

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS pod_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS running_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS running_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 2

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS pending_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 1

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS failed_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.uid) WHERE k8s.pod.phase == 4

Shows the 10 namespaces consuming the most CPU.
